evals.prompt: Enrich john@stripe.com — give me everything you can find on the person and their company.
evals.expected_output: Runs comprehensive-enrichment with email=john@stripe.com and domain=stripe.com, fans out across person and company providers, and returns a summary card (contact, verified emails, bio) plus a company snapshot.
assertions: The skill comprehensive-enrichment is selected
The email param is set to john@stripe.com and domain is derived as stripe.com
Person steps (Hunter email-enrichment, Apollo people-enrichment) and the Hunter email-verifier step run
Company steps (Abstract Company Enrichment lookup, Diffbot KG enhance) run because the employer domain is known

evals.prompt: Look up John Doe at Stripe and find his work email and phone.
evals.expected_output: Runs the skill with firstName=John, lastName=Doe, company=Stripe; finds and verifies email; returns phone from Clado contacts when a LinkedIn URL is available.
assertions: firstName=John, lastName=Doe, company=Stripe params are set
Hunter email-finder and the Hunter email-verifier steps run
Clado contacts (phone) runs when linkedinUrl is provided, and is noted as requiring a LinkedIn URL otherwise
Output labels each email with a verification status

evals.prompt: Research stripe.com — overview, funding, and competitors.
evals.expected_output: Runs the company branch with domain=stripe.com: Abstract Company Enrichment overview, Diffbot KG funding + investors, Exa findSimilar competitors.
assertions: domain param is set to stripe.com
Abstract Company Enrichment lookup and Diffbot KG enhance (funding + investors) steps run
Exa findSimilar runs for competitors
Person-only steps are skipped or return empty when no person identifier is given

evals.expected_output: Runs with linkedinUrl set; every executed step is rail=routed (MPP via SELAT Router); no direct-rail or non-MPP calls.
assertions: linkedinUrl param is set to https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe
Every step in the run reports rail=routed
Apollo people-enrichment and Clado contacts steps run with the LinkedIn URL
No step uses the direct rail

evals.prompt: Enrich acme.com but keep it cheap — skip the expensive lookups.
evals.expected_output: Runs company steps for acme.com, and the user can drop the priciest steps; total spend stays within the per-step caps (live-price sum is ~$0.58; manifest fallback cap $1.00).
assertions: domain param is set to acme.com
The total run respects the manifest maxAmount of 1.00
Each executed step's spend is bounded by its per-step maxAmount
Clado search ($0.31815) and Hunter domain-search ($0.10815) are identified as the most expensive and skippable

evals.prompt: Before paying, probe the enrichment endpoints for stripe.com to confirm they answer with a 402.
evals.expected_output: Uses selat-pay --probe-only against the skill's endpoints (e.g. Abstract Company Enrichment lookup, Apollo people-enrichment) to confirm 402 challenges without paying.
assertions: The validation uses selat-pay with the --probe-only flag
At least one probe targets a host+path from references/endpoints.md
No payment is sent during probing
The skill is not run in pay mode during validation
